( CHNLGB, SEQNO, TRCLS, TRDATE, TRTIME, CUSTINFO, TXCD, ERRCD, DATA, IP, USERID ) VALUES ( #{chnlGb}, CHAR(CONCAT(VARCHAR_FORMAT(CURRENT TIMESTAMP, 'HH24MISSFF3'), INT(RAND()* 8999 + 1000))), #{trCls}, VARCHAR_FORMAT(CURRENT TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDD'), VARCHAR_FORMAT(CURRENT TIMESTAMP, 'HH24MISS'), #{custInfo}, #{txCd}, #{errCd}, #{data}, #{ipAddress}, #{userId} )
